home.heroDesc: Experience the finest organic dragon fruit, cultivated with sustainable practices and delivered with exceptional quality. Nature's exotic treasure.

healthBenefits.title: Superfood Benefits
healthBenefits.subtitle: Why Dragon Fruit?
healthBenefits.desc: Nature's beautiful superfood packed with essential nutrients for your daily wellness.
healthBenefits.antioxidantsDesc: Helps fight free radicals and prevents cellular damage.
healthBenefits.immunityDesc: High Vitamin C content strengthens your natural defenses.
healthBenefits.fiberDesc: Promotes healthy digestion and gut microbiome.
healthBenefits.heartDesc: Improves cardiovascular health and reduces bad cholesterol.

whyChooseUs.title: The Shivalaiya Difference
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Farming with Purpose
whyChooseUs.desc: We don’t just grow fruits; we cultivate an ecosystem. Here is why our dragon fruits are simply better.
whyChooseUs.organicDesc: Zero chemical pesticides or synthetic fertilizers.
whyChooseUs.handPickedDesc: Harvested exactly at peak ripeness for maximum sweetness.
whyChooseUs.farmToHomeDesc: Specializing in bulk supply for retailers and distributors (Min 100kg).

recipe.title: A Taste of Paradise
recipe.subtitle: How to Enjoy
recipe.step1: Blend frozen dragon fruit (pink variety) with a splash of coconut water until thick and smooth.
recipe.step3: Top generously with granola, chia seeds, fresh berries, and a drizzle of honey.

videoTour.title: Experience the Farm
videoTour.desc: Take a breathtaking virtual tour of our 10-acre organic paradise nestled in the fertile lands of Coimbatore.

gallery.title: Farm Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A Visual Journey
gallery.desc: Glimpses of our daily life, from midnight blooming to the golden sunrise harvest.

home.featuredDesc: Discover our delicious dragon fruit varieties, each with unique flavor profiles and nutritional benefits.
home.ctaDesc: Connect with us for wholesale inquiries or visit our farm for a fresh experience.

products.moroccoRedDesc: Premium variety with vibrant magenta flesh. Exceptionally sweet with rich antioxidants. Our signature variety.
products.mexicanRedDesc: Bold and flavorful with deep red flesh. Perfect balance of sweetness and tanginess.
products.malaysianRedDesc: Tropical delight with sweet, refreshing taste. Packed with nutrients and natural goodness.

about.aboutDesc: Shivalaiya Dragon Farm—a family-owned farm dedicated to growing the finest organic dragon fruit with sustainable practices and a passion for quality.
about.missionPara1: To provide the world with premium organic dragon fruit while preserving the environment and supporting local communities. We believe that great taste and sustainability go hand in hand.
about.missionPara2: Every fruit we grow is a testament to our commitment to quality—from seed to harvest, we nurture each plant with care and respect for nature's delicate balance.
about.organicPracticesDesc: No pesticides, no chemicals. Pure organic farming that respects the land.
about.waterConservationDesc: Efficient irrigation systems and rainwater harvesting for sustainable growth.
about.communityFocusDesc: Supporting local farmers and creating jobs in our rural community.
about.exploreProcess: Curious about how we maintain this excellence? Take a walk through our farm.
about.meetFounders: Meet the Minds Behind the Farm

timeline.2016Desc: Acquisition of 10 acres in the fertile red soil belt of Erode, dedicated to organic farming.
timeline.2018Desc: Planting over 5,000 high-yield Morocco and Mexican red dragon fruit cuttings.
timeline.2022Desc: Implementing 100% Zero-Budget Natural Farming systems for long-term soil health.
timeline.2023Desc: First major commercial harvest reaching premium markets with exceptional Brix levels.
timeline.2024Desc: Expansion of trellis systems and adoption of solar-powered hydration monitoring.

founders.ponnusamyBio: With a visionary mindset, Ponnusamy founded and established the dragon fruit farm. His dedication and innovative approach turned the idea into reality, laying the foundation for the farm's growth, quality, and success.

about.scienceSubtitle: How we achieve superior organic quality

scienceCards.livingSoilDesc: We nurture the earth using Zero-Budget Natural Farming (ZBNF), creating a microbial-rich ecosystem that feeds the fruit naturally.
scienceCards.brixPerfectionDesc: Our fruits consistently reach high Brix levels (sweetness), a result of our specialized organic nutrition and soil health.
scienceCards.zeroWasteDesc: Everything from our pruning waste to rainfall is cycled back into the farm, ensuring a closed-loop sustainable ecosystem.

products.productsDesc: Explore our full range of organic dragon fruit varieties and specialty products. Each one grown with care and delivered with pride.
products.wholesaleDesc: Interested in purchasing larger quantities? We offer competitive wholesale pricing for restaurants, retailers, and distributors.
products.bulkEstimatorDesc: Calculate your wholesale requirements and packaging needs in seconds.
products.moroccoRedDesc: Premium variety with vibrant magenta flesh. Exceptionally sweet with a subtle berry flavor. Rich in antioxidants and Vitamin C. Our signature variety.
products.moroccoRedBenefits: High Bioavailability: Known for a high water-to-flesh ratio, making the nutrients more easily absorbed during digestion.
products.moroccoRedFlavor: Exceptionally sweet with a subtle berry flavor.
products.moroccoRedUsage: Perfect for vibrant smoothie bowls, fresh fruit salads, or enjoyed chilled as a refreshing snack.
products.mexicanRedDesc: Bold and flavorful with deep red flesh. Perfect balance of sweetness and tanginess. A favorite among dragon fruit enthusiasts.
products.mexicanRedBenefits: Maximum Betalains: This variety is often "darker" than others. These pigments have been studied for their ability to inhibit lipid peroxidation (protecting your "good" cholesterol from damage).
products.mexicanRedFlavor: Perfect balance of sweetness and tanginess with deep earthy undertones.
products.mexicanRedUsage: Complements savory dishes as a gourmet garnish or shines in fresh tropical sorbets and mocktails.
products.malaysianRedDesc: Tropical delight with sweet, refreshing taste. Creamy texture with excellent nutritional profile. Packed with natural goodness.
products.malaysianRedBenefits: Prebiotic Power: It has a high concentration of oligosaccharides (functional carbohydrates). These act as "food" for your healthy gut bacteria, improving microbiome diversity.
products.malaysianRedFlavor: Refreshing tropical sweetness with a mild, creamy finish.
products.malaysianRedUsage: Ideal for fresh snacking, adding to yogurt parfaits, or blending into creamy tropical juices.
products.cVarietyDesc: Unique hybrid variety with distinctive characteristics. Smooth, creamy flesh with a delicate sweetness. Perfect for gourmet applications.
products.cVarietyBenefits: Skin Health: This variety is noted for high concentrations of Vitamin E and C in the flesh, which aids in collagen synthesis and protects skin from UV-induced oxidative stress.
products.cVarietyFlavor: Delicate sweetness with notes of melon and cucumber.
products.cVarietyUsage: A sophisticated choice for gourmet desserts, elegant fruit platters, or as a base for exotic sauces.
products.israelianYellowDesc: The sweetest of all varieties with golden yellow flesh. Tropical pineapple notes and honey-like sweetness. A rare delicacy from our farm.
products.israelianYellowBenefits: The highest natural sugar content (Brix level) provides a quick, healthy energy boost and essential electrolytes.
products.israelianYellowFlavor: Tropical pineapple notes and rich honey-like sweetness.
products.israelianYellowUsage: Best enjoyed chilled and sliced, or paired with a touch of lime to contrast its intense sweetness.
products.jumboRedDesc: Extra-large premium variety with vibrant red flesh. Exceptionally juicy with intense sweetness. Perfect for special occasions and premium markets.
products.jumboRedBenefits: Satiety & Weight Management: Because of the sheer volume of the fruit, it provides a high degree of "sensory specific satiety"—meaning you feel full longer due to the fiber-to-calorie ratio.
products.jumboRedFlavor: Intense, robust sweetness with a juicy, melt-in-the-mouth texture.
products.jumboRedUsage: Perfect for large gatherings, dramatic centerpieces, or juicing for a dense, nutrient-packed drink.
products.americanBeautyDesc: Beautiful variety with stunning pink skin and white flesh. Delicate flavor with a perfect balance of sweetness. A visual and culinary masterpiece.
products.americanBeautyBenefits: Immune System Support: This variety consistently tests high for Vitamin C. Regular consumption can help modulate the immune response.
products.americanBeautyFlavor: Sophisticated floral sweetness with a crisp, refreshing finish.
products.americanBeautyUsage: A stunning addition to fruit kebabs, aesthetic salads, or as a fresh aesthetic topping for pancakes.
products.dragonJamDesc: Handcrafted premium jam made from our finest dragon fruits. Rich, sweet, and bursting with natural flavor. Perfect for breakfast or desserts.
products.dragonJamBenefits: Made from 100% natural fruit pulp with no artificial colors or flavors. A healthier spread alternative.
products.dragonJamFlavor: Concentrated dragon fruit sweetness with a smooth, velvety texture.
products.dragonJamUsage: Spread generously on warm sourdough toast, swirl into morning oatmeal, or use as a topping for vanilla ice cream.
products.dragonHalvaDesc: Traditional halva infused with dragon fruit. A unique fusion of authentic Indian sweet with exotic dragon fruit flavor. Rich, aromatic, and delightful.
products.dragonHalvaBenefits: A rich source of healthy fats and natural energy, combined with the antioxidant power of dragon fruit.
products.dragonHalvaFlavor: Nutty, aromatic sweetness with a distinct exotic fruit finish.
products.dragonHalvaUsage: The perfect traditional sweet for festivals, served warm after a meal or gifted to loved ones.
products.dragonChipsDesc: Crunchy, healthy, and naturally sweet dehydrated dragon fruit slices. The perfect guilt-free snack for any time of the day.
products.dragonChipsBenefits: Dehydrated at low temperatures to preserve all enzymes and vitamins. 100% fruit, zero added sugar.
products.dragonChipsFlavor: Intense, naturally sweet crunch that concentrates the fruit's essence.
products.dragonChipsUsage: Enjoy straight from the pack for a satisfying crunch, or crumble over yogurt and granola bowls.

gallery.galleryDesc: Take a visual tour of our farm—from blooming flowers to harvest day. Experience the beauty of organic dragon fruit cultivation.
gallery.sunriseHarvestDesc: Official signboard of Shivalaiya Dragon Farm, welcoming you to our 10-acre organic paradise.
gallery.bloomingFlowersDesc: Rows of healthy, vibrant dragon fruit plants flourishing under the tropical Coimbatore sun.
gallery.vineyardRowsDesc: Our sustainable farming approach, integrating dragon fruit cultivation with native flora like palm trees.
gallery.freshPickedDesc: Specialized concrete support systems ensure uniform growth and high-quality fruit production.
gallery.farmSunsetDesc: A detailed look at the healthy, robust stems of our dragon fruit plants, reflecting pure organic care.
gallery.organicCertDesc: The vast rows of our organic farm, designed for optimal sunlight and natural ventilation.
gallery.familyFarmDesc: A macro view of a dragon fruit flower bud, just days away from its magnificent midnight performance.
gallery.marketReadyDesc: Our operational hub where we manage harvesting, sorting, and organic quality controls.
gallery.tropicalParadiseDesc: Our loyal companion keeps a watchful eye over the fields, ensuring the safety of our organic treasures.

process.processDesc: Discover how we grow premium organic dragon fruit with sustainable practices and unwavering commitment to quality.
process.landPreparationDesc: Our soil is the foundation. We enrich the native red soil with high-grade organic vermicompost and multi-layer natural fertilizers to create a perfect PH balance for dragon fruit roots.
process.landPreparationTech: Enriched with 15kg/pole organic manure + bio-fertilizers like Azospirillum.
process.landPreparationDive: We use a multi-step soil conditioning process including green manuring and application of natural minerals to ensure long-term soil health and productivity. The native red soil is meticulously mixed with processed cow manure and vermicompost for months before the first sapling is even considered.
process.plantingTrellisingDesc: We use a high-efficiency trellis system with concrete support poles. Young cuttings are carefully aligned to ensure maximum sunlight exposure and uniform fruit weight.
process.plantingTrellisingTech: 4-pole trellis system with 2x2.5m spacing for optimal air circulation.
process.plantingTrellisingDive: Our concrete poles are designed for durability, while the circular rings allow the dragon fruit vines to drape naturally, preventing stem breakage and maximizing fruiting area. This vertical farming method allows us to grow more in less space while maintaining plant health.
process.organicCareDesc: Our plants are fed with 'Jeevamrutham' (liquid organic manure) and protected using Neem-based sprays. This creates a chemical-free ecosystem where beneficial insects thrive.
process.organicCareTech: 100% Zero-Budget Natural Farming (ZBNF) methods. Weekly nutrient fertigation.
process.organicCareDive: Zero chemicals. We brew our own liquid fertilizers using cow-based inputs and botanical extracts, creating a living soil that naturally repels harmful pests. We use 'Dashaparani Kashayam' (a mixture of 10 bitter leaves) to ensure that the plants are protected without any toxic residues.
process.bloomingDesc: A magical midnight event. Our flowers bloom purely under moonlight, attracting natural pollinators like honeybees and moths before closing at sunrise.
process.bloomingTech: Flowering cycle peaks between May and November. 12-hour midnight bloom window.
process.bloomingDive: Since dragon fruit are mostly self-sterile or benefit from cross-pollination, we maintain high biodiversity in our farm to ensure plenty of night-time pollinator activity. The giant white flowers are a sight to behold, attracting moths and bats that are vital to our organic ecosystem.
process.nightBloomPoem: While the world sleeps, our farm awakens. For one night only, the giant white petals unfurl under the silver glow of the moon. It is a silent, magical performance of nature—a rare moment of purity that defines our organic essence.
process.harvestDesc: Harvesting begins at 4:00 AM to preserve fruit temperature. We only pick once the Brix level (sweetness) reaches its peak, ensuring maximum natural sugar.
process.harvestTech: Picked at Stage 3 color ripeness (approx. 30-35 days post-bloom).
process.harvestDive: Timing is everything. We monitor the sugar development daily and harvest only during the coolest part of the day (early morning) to ensure the fruit remains firm and fresh. The fruits are placed in padded crates immediately to prevent any bruising.
process.qualityDeliveryDesc: Post-harvest, fruits undergo ultrasonic cleaning and air-drying before being sorted by weight. We ensure efficient bulk delivery to regional hubs.
process.qualityDeliveryTech: Weight-based sorting: A-Grade (400g+), B-Grade (250-400g). Cold-chain ready packaging.
process.qualityDeliveryDive: Our sorting process uses sensitive electronic scales to ensure consistency. We use custom-ventilated packaging to allow the fruit to 'breathe' during transit, maintaining that 'just-picked' flavor until it reaches its destination. Every batch is tracked from the specific trellis it came from.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.ctaDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our team is here to help you with everything dragon fruit!
faq.a1: Our farm is located at Shivalaiya Farms, Siruvani Main Road, Coimbatore. You can find the exact location on the map below.
faq.a2: Yes! We welcome visitors during our farm visit hours. For large groups or special tours, please contact us in advance.
faq.q3: Is your dragon fruit certified organic?
faq.a3: Yes, we follow strictly organic farming practices. We do not use any chemical pesticides or synthetic fertilizers.
faq.a4: Currently, we only offer bulk orders (minimum 100 kg) for regional distribution to ensure peak freshness and quality scale. Please contact us to check availability in your area.
faq.q5: What is the best way to store dragon fruit?
faq.a5: Dragon fruit is best stored in the refrigerator. It can stay fresh for up to two weeks when kept cool.
